title: Trademark claim (Apple App Name)
html: Stub. Apple's process for releasing a taken App Store name — Yahir filed one Aug 25 2025 after App Store Connect rejected "Brotein" as already-in-use. Acknowledgement received same afternoon. Blocking step for the Brotein launch listing.

related.label: Brotein name collision — App Store rejected the trademark
Trademark claim acknowledgement — Thank You page
